---
title: "Shun Yamaguchi"
---

---

CS student focused on system design and mathematics. 

Currently, studying in undergrad programm seaking CS degree with strong argorithm and math skills.

Also I'm learning network side as well.

::: {.callout-note callapse="true"}
### Side Note:

I'm using Quarto to build this website to practice use of Quarto.

Plus, I will build this website well after learning graph theory (intro part).
:::

[About](about) | [Links](links) | [Contact](contact) | [Dono](https://ko-fi.com/shuny){target="_blank"}
